summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 listed PRs. No shared canonical was selected. Security-sensitive open PRs are routed to central security handling; closed PRs are kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer/proof follow-up without closure, merge, or fix actions.

actions.reason: Useful focused candidate for a hydrated issue, but this inventory shard should not merge or close it.

Authorization/scope-boundary changes require central security/maintainer handling, not PR-inventory cleanup.
The remaining decision is maintainer review of a maintainer-owned PR, not dedupe or closure.
Already closed; no mutation should be planned.
Already closed after maintainer/product direction; no further action in this shard.
Independent open PR needing proof; not a duplicate, superseded PR, or low-signal close candidate.
SSRF guard policy changes are security-sensitive and must be handled centrally.
Plugin lifecycle/update-hook changes flagged security-sensitive should be routed rather than closed, merged, or repaired here.
